meaning: n.[医]嗜铬细胞瘤(一种交感神经系统的肿瘤)
examples: This pheochromocytoma demonstrates the chromaffin reaction.
Objective: to evaluate the diagnosis and treatment of adrenal pheochromocytoma.
Objective: to improve the diagnosis and treatment of recurrent pheochromocytoma.
For some people, imaging studies, such as CT scans, done for another reason, may catch a pheochromocytoma before it produces symptoms.
